benefits.description: improved word-finding ability, sharper mind, quicker wit
regaining joy and fulfillment from hobbies, emotional regulation improvement, reduced fiery emotion and impulsivity
improved focus and concentration, calm natural focus without Adderall side effects
improved depth perception, things no longer feel flat
ability to manage complex tasks, improved planning and financial management
reduced mental noise, improved attention control
improved procrastination and ability to perform tasks

protocol_notes: User obtained peptides from integrativepeptides.com and Tailor Made. Uses CerebroPep (described as similar to Cerebrolysin). Combined peptide therapy with hormone replacement therapy, IASIS neurofeedback therapy, IV supplementation, chiropractic care, and cognitive behavioral therapy. Describes peptides as 'professional grade' not 'for research purposes only'. Treated by functional medicine/concierge doctor. TBI from 2006 motor vehicle accident; took 14+ years to get proper diagnosis.
